origin.label: Bundled CX-1 demo scorecard
origin.description: Synthetic sample shipped with the standalone dashboard. Not live account proof.

pipeline_stages.title: Gate
pipeline_stages.body: Every proposed change passes through schema, evidence-completeness, and policy gates before it can touch a live budget.

pipeline_stages.title: Log
pipeline_stages.body: Tamper-evident receipt of the proposal, counterfactual baseline, and verifier inputs. Reproducible across replays.

pipeline_stages.title: Verify
pipeline_stages.body: Posterior-replay verifier produces a calibrated lift estimate plus credible interval. SBC-validated and placebo-checked.

pipeline_stages.title: Decide
pipeline_stages.body: Scale, hold, or cut — backed by a calibrated interval rather than a platform-reported point estimate.
